title: Awards & Recognition | Growthik Media
description: Our agency accreditations from Google, HubSpot and Web Design institutions.

sections.heading: Certified Excellence.
sections.content: AwardsCertified Excellence.A selection of our certifications mapping globally recognized standards in UI/UX and Ads Performance.Review Our AccreditationsOur Commitment to Industry StandardsAt Growthik Media, excellence isn't just a goal - it's our baseline. We consistently invest in certifications and training to ensure our Pune-based team remains at the bleeding edge of digital marketing and web engineering.From Google Ads Search and Display certifications to advanced Next.js architecture and UI/UX design awards, our recognition reflects our dedication to delivering measurable ROI for our clients globally.Why Certifications MatterGuaranteed adherence to latest platform algorithmsVerified expertise in conversion rate optimizationAccess to beta features and priority platform supportProven track record in high-performance web engineeringDigital Accreditation PortalOur full gallery of digital certificates from Google, HubSpot and Meta is currently being synchronized. This portal will allow you to verify our active credentials in real-time.
